meaning: n.闈炲浗鏁欏緬,涓嶉伒濂夎嫳鍥藉浗鏁欑殑鍩虹潱鏂版暀寰抋dj.涓嶄俊濂夎嫳鍥藉浗鏁欑殑
examples: Victoria stood out as a dazzling nonconformist.
Whoso would be a man must be a nonconformist.
Her Nonconformist designs stressed simplicity and comfort.
Nowadays, this nonconformist spirit manifests itself as an unwillingness to follow traffic regulations.
They are accessories to the crime, enablers in the art of walking in heels, rather than nonconformist game changers.
